rationale: The ensures of det_<f> is `A ==> det_equal`, so we wrap the entire proof in `if A { ... }` (the previous attempt asserted antecedent conjuncts unconditionally and rightly failed). Inside the if-block we prove the scalar conjuncts (r1.0 == r2.0, is_init eq, addr eq) and close spec_seq Seq-extensional equality from the per-index is_empty pinning of PageEntry, plus we push the wf()-derived usize2page_entry match for ar so Verus has every fact it needs for the final PageMapView extensional equality.
